tasks.label: build
args: echo Compiling Host... && g++ -g -Wall -Wextra -std=c++20 -Iinclude/core -Iinclude/systems -Iinclude/host src\Host.cpp src\core\*.cpp src\host\*.cpp src\instructions\*.cpp src\Core\Utility\*.cpp -o dist\rv64i.exe && echo Compiling Core... && g++ -g -Wall -Wextra -std=c++20 -Iinclude/core -Iinclude/systems src\Core.cpp src\core\*.cpp src\instructions\*.cpp src\Core\Utility\*.cpp  -o dist\rv64i-core.exe && echo Done!
